title: Cobblemon Masters
description:
1.20.1 Cobblemon-focused modpack built for the spnkrtSMP! Includes many QoL and Performance mods for an enjoyable Cobblemon experience.

Have any questions or want to get to know our players? Come join our community!
body:
# __**Cobblemon Masters - An optimized Cobblemon Experience**__

Cobblemon Masters is a Cobblemon-focused modpack built for the Cobblemon Masters server. Alongside Cobblemon, the modpack includes many QoL and Performance mods for an enjoyable Cobblemon experience, such as Farmer's Delight, Supplementaries, BetterEnd, Macaw's, and a plethora of other mods to enhance your Cobblemon Experience. We also have a few utility mods, allowing for a seamless team creation experience.

We recommend at **least** 4 GB of allocated RAM for smooth gameplay!

Join our Discord Server for more info: https://discord.gg/uzxd3rmr6f
Server IP: spnkrtsmp.shock-zone.com


# Datapacks used:

- **Expanded Movesets 2.0 & PokeSizes** - Beezy: https://modrinth.com/user/Beezy with [permission](https://imgur.com/a/jjn7Rs7)


- **Item Balls** - DanMizu: https://modrinth.com/datapack/item-balls with [permission](https://imgur.com/a/G6HTKOM)

<details>
